### What is the .md5 file?

description:
### **About Release**
--------------------
A release of [NF WEB-DL and AAC2.0 Audio](https://nyaa.si/?q=[ToonsHub]+Orb+On+the+Movements+of+the+Earth+NF+WEB-DL) with an improved version of NF Subtitles, while adding sign translations.





#### **Orb On the Movements of the Earth - Episode 21**
--------------------
![](https://i.kek.sh/w0WRKcAay1v.png)

### [**時代は変わる**](https://anime-chi.jp/story/detail.php?id=21)
ヨレンタが「地動説」を守るために選んだ、悲しい結末。一方のシュミットらは組織の本拠地で仲間らと無事に合流を果たす。こうして活版印刷により『地球の運動について』の本はついに完成する。が、ある人物の行動によって計画は瓦解。ノヴァクにアジトの場所を知られてしまう。ここで徹底抗戦か、いったん退却して態勢を整えるか。究極の選択を迫られる中、ドゥラカがある提案をする。

### [**The Times Are Changing**](https://thetvdb.com/series/chi-chikyuu-no-undou-ni-tsuite/episodes/10730534)
Schmidt and the others regroup with their Liberation Front comrades and begin printing the book. However, a traitor brings their operation to a halt.

description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/ycA16eY.jpeg "Rascal Does Not Dream of Santa Claus")

IS THE REAL MINISKIRT SANTA IN A SEA OF FAKES?

Sakuta thought he’d already accomplished step one: Find Touko Kirishima. The next step was convincing her to help protect Mai, but that proved easier said than done. In the process, however, he makes a confusing discovery: There are multiple Touko Kirishimas! The Touko he knows may not actually be the person he’s looking for! With clues from his friends’ prophetic dreams, he gets closer to figuring out exactly what danger awaits Mai, but he’ll have to sort through the fake Kirishimas and determine who’s the real deal before it’s too late....

son plan pour reconquérir sa place à Kamakura.

ソロデビュー10周年を迎えた櫻子のミュージシャンとしての新たなステージの幕開けとなる約2年半ぶりのオリジナルフルアルバム。
配信シングルとしてリリースされた絢香提供の「Collection」、水野良樹（いきものがかり）提供の「櫻」、アンジェラ・アキ提供の「名前」に加え、さかいゆう、高橋啓太（オトナモード）、フジタカコ、矢野まきなどシンガーソングライター系ミュージシャンを中心とした作家陣による楽曲提供により、 シンガーとしての大原櫻子の今までにない新たな魅力が開花。

鈴木正人、akkin、伊藤立、兼松衆、河内肇、河野圭、河野伸、松岡モトキ、真部脩一、Ryo’LEFTY’Miyataなど日本の音楽シーンを代表する多彩な豪華アレンジャー陣によるサウンド世界が色を添え、より音楽的な深みを増した極上のポップスアルバムが完成。

かつて、高知県のとある村で“原因不明の病”が村人を襲っていた。現地では、村人のために命を落とした名主の祟り「ほっぱん」と長年恐れられてきたという。ある１人の男性が「ほっぱん」解明に立ち向かう。

**中卒で丁稚の世界に飛び込み、一流の職人を目指していた16歳の松下の姿が消えた…
横浜市にある家具製作会社「秋山木工」。かつては入社すると男女問わず、住み込みで5年間の修業。スマホを持つことも許されず、タバコも恋愛も禁止、丸刈り姿の丁稚生活だったのだが、ここ数年、新人が次々と辞めてしまうため、自由な生活ができる「外弟子」制度を設けた。変わりゆく秋山木工に、2024年春、入社したのは7人の新入社員…寮に住み込む内弟子を選んだのは、高校を卒業し上京してきた18歳の新人ただ一人だった。
そんな新人たちを指導するのは、1期先輩の内弟子・松下（16）と友添（26）の2人。中学を卒業し、秋山木工の門をたたいた松下にとって、新人たちは全員が「年上の後輩」となり、兄弟子として指導をすることが、松下にとってプレッシャーになるのではないかと周囲は心配していた。この年の始まりに、松下は心身の不調で、しばらくの間、実家に帰っていたからだ。
そんな中、職人の世界に足を踏みいれた7人の新人たちも、時がたつに連れて、少しずつ遅刻や欠勤が目立つようになる…「技能五輪で金メダルを取る」ことを目標に、15歳から秋山木工で働く松下は、大会に向けて地道な自主練習を続けていたのだが、ある日、その姿が寮から消えてしまった…
一流の職人を目指して丁稚奉公の世界で生きる若者たちの夢の行方は…
【語り】野呂佳代**

title: [USP] Mashin Souzouden Wataru - 01 [9581DCD4] (Spanish Subs - HEVC).mkv
description:
El día de hoy estrenamos anime en USP. Se trata de Mashin Souzouden Wataru, un anime de la temporada de invierno (y que ya está en su recta final) que tenía tiempo y ganas de sacar desde hace mucho. Lamentablemente por falta de tiempo y personal no había sido posible, así que se tuvieron que recortar muchas de las cosas a las que les teníamos acostumbrados:
- Se utilizó IA para la traducción, revisada por un servidor para evitar detalles y problemas de comprensión y para homologar algunos términos (no se hagan, ustedes siguen fansubs que usan IA desde antes que yo lo haga)
- No se cuenta con estilos para los letreros ni karaokes para los OP/ED.
- La especialidad del canal es el HEVC, la cual se mantiene en esta serie.

Los siguientes episodios serán lanzados de la misma forma, esperando tenerlos listos todos antes de terminar el mes. De momento les muestro el episodio 1.

---

General info:
* Batches are uploaded on Tuesday evening.
* Split chapters that were originally published as a whole are joined, split chapters that were originally published split are not.
* For some series the title is so long that it exceeds the maximum path length, in this case (folder) names will be truncated. *(Example: the folder name for "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability" is simply "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince.")*
* Previous batches can be found [here](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=3_1&q=weekly+k+manga+chapter+update).
* To search batches, use google with the following string: "site:nyaa.si weekly k manga {search query}".

**Описание:**

Однажды юноша по имени Хината Сунохара попал в другой мир и стал там героем. Объединившись с тёмной эльфийкой Мариябелль, получеловеком Мэй и священницей Сесиль, Хината успешно победил короля демонов. Исполнив свою миссию, Хината вернулся в родной мир к привычной жизни... но уже через месяц Мариябелль пожаловала к нему домой. Зачем? Чтобы выйти за него замуж! В общую неразбериху ворвалась одноклассница Хинаты, Сакура, и в его жизни началось настоящее веселье! Сможет ли он выдержать настойчивость Мариябелль?!

**Дополнительная информация:**

Вот так спасёшь мир, а гаремник твой за тобой в родной мир прилетит, и начнет мешать спокойно жить)
В озвучке Dream Cast - чиби мини сериал после титров будет выкладываться в озвучке Deep, тк пока Dream Cast эти чиби эпизоды не перевели.
После показа 01 серии все наши лицензионные стриминговые сервисы отказались от 2х тайтлов Прячься, Макина! / Kakushite! Makina-san! и Chotto dake Ai ga Omoi Dark Elf ga Isekai kara Oikakete Kita | Yandere Dark Elf | Слегка настойчивая тёмная эльфийка последовала за мной из другого мира - как итог - компания РуАниме Deep удалила все новости и посты связанные с релизом данного аниме у себя из всех платформ. Мы конечно оставим в 1й серии труд ребят, как напоминание - насколько иногда хрупкие могут быть отношения между лицензиоными стримингами и лицензиоными поставщиками контента/издателями - вроде все норм и договорились, а патом ХОБА и все рубанули.

title: [neoDESU] Demon Lord 2099 [Season 1] [BD 1080p x265 HEVC OPUS AAC] [Dual Audio] Maou 2099
description:
![](https://i.lensdump.com/i/6BKULK.png)
*Come hang out in **[Discord](https://discord.gg/47Q7FdB54e)***

#### **[Demon Lord 2099 [Season 1]](https://myanimelist.net/anime/54853/Maou_2099)**

---

**Synopsis**
Five hundred years ago, the fantasy world of Alneath was torn apart by a war between magically gifted immortals and mortals armed with magical artifacts. The conflict came to an end when mortals' hero, Gram, slayed the Demon Lord Veltol Velvet Velsvolt. In 2099, the world looks a bit different. Alneath and technologically advanced Earth have fused in an event known as Fantasion. Immortals have been hunted down to near extinction, and technological implants called Familia allow mortals to use magic.

As the new world slowly recovers, Veltol's vassal Machina Solege resurrects him in Shinjuku, a techno-magical city constructed in the middle of devastated lands. However, Veltol's magic is severely weakened, and his former ally Marcus has betrayed him. To regain his fame and magical abilities, Veltol follows the advice of Takahashi—Machina's friend and a professional hacker—to start an unusual career: live streaming. His sharp tongue and comically poor gaming skills quickly secure him followers, but to dominate the world once again, Veltol must first uncover Shinjuku's secrets and thwart Marcus' vile plans.

![](https://d.l3n.co/i/DimxLF.png)

---

**Language Options**
Included are two scripts that that do the following (Windows/Linux):

1. Make [Single Audio] Japanese: Throws out *English audio* and *Signs&Songs subtitles* tracks
2. Make [Single Audio] English: Throws out *Japanese audio* and *Dialogue subtitles* tracks
	
Put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the corresponding script.
*Note for Linux: mkvtoolnix package must be installed*

---

**Source**
🗃️ Video and JP Audio (JP BDMV): **[Team HAYAKU]**
🗃️ ENG Audio (WEB): **[[Yameii]](https://nyaa.si/view/1891424)**
🗃️ Subtitles: **[[Chihiro]](https://nyaa.si/view/1889730)**

*Thank you all for making this possible <3*

Someone found the video resources of this episode and commissioned our team to perform a 1080P high-definition restoration. I hope everyone enjoys it!

title: [A-Evolution] Plunderer [BD 1080p]
description:
![Jujutsu Kaisen Sezonul 2](https://cdn.myanimelist.net/images/anime/1534/104784.jpg)

**Descriere**:

Într-o lume post-apocaliptică dominată de un sistem bizar de "Numere", fiecare persoană are un Contor vizibil pe corpul său — un număr care reflectă o acțiune specifică (de exemplu, câți pași a făcut, câte persoane a ajutat etc.). Dacă numărul scade la zero... persoana este trasă în Abyss și dispare.
Aici o întâlnim pe Hina, o tânără care călătorește pentru a-și îndeplini dorința mamei și pentru a găsi "Legendarul As", un luptător misterios. Pe drum îl întâlnește pe Licht Bach, un individ aparent leneș și comic, dar care ascunde o putere devastatoare și un trecut întunecat.
Pe măsură ce povestea avansează, anime-ul dezvăluie o conspirație militară, adevărul din spatele numerelor și o lume mult mai complexă decât pare la început.

---

**P.S.** Avem nevoie de **_Traducători_**, **_Verificatori_** și **_Encoderi_** _pentru sezonul de primăvară_!  
Nu e neapărată nevoie de experiență. **Vă arătăm noi tot ce e nevoie!**  
Mulțumim! ^^

**P.P.S.** Pentru o mai bună vizionare a proiectelor noastre, echipa A-Evolution recomandă următoarele playere:  
**MPV**, **MPC (Media Player Classic)** și **VLC**.

---

title: That Inferior Knight, Level 999 001-034 as v01-11 (Digital-Compilation) (Oak-JXL) [JPEG-XL] [Completed]
description:
#### JPEG-XL VISUALLY LOSSLESS (-d 1.0) VERSION.

| Volumes | Resolution | Source | [Denoised](https://pastebin.com/ZeY9fqxW) | Leveled | Spreads | Posterized | Clean Raws |
|  :---------: | :------------: | :---------: | :--------------------------------------------------------: | :---------: | :---------: | :-------------: | :--------------: |
| 1-6 | x3071 | [Manga UP! Global App](https://global.manga-up.com/manga/20) | ✅ | N/A | ✅ | ❌ (JXL) | ✅ |
| 7 | x3071/x3072 | [Manga UP! Global App](https://global.manga-up.com/manga/20) | ✅ | N/A | ✅ | ❌ (JXL) | ✅ |
| 8-11 | x3072 | [Manga UP! Global App](https://global.manga-up.com/manga/20) | ✅ | N/A | ✅ | ❌ (JXL) | ✅ |

*These compiled volumes include raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*

----

***The JPEG-XL images are created from the denoised PNGs after converting from AVIF.***
To open JPEG-XL images your reading software need to support this, check [here](https://wotaku.wiki/guides/manga/jxl) for supported software.
Komga (and Kavita Canary) is able to open and serve JXL files, they will auto-convert if accessing (OPDS) application does not handle JXL.

----

Volumes 01-11 contain chapters 001-034, chapters only in Posterized PNG4: https://nyaa.si/view/1980894
Compiled tank-style volumes 01-11 of chapters 001-034 in Posterized PNG4: https://nyaa.si/view/1980895

title: That Inferior Knight, Level 999 001-034 (2022-2025) (Digital) (Oak) [Completed]
description:
Obtained directly from [Manga UP!](https://global.manga-up.com/manga/20).
[Converted and denoised](https://pastebin.com/ZeY9fqxW) x3071 (001-019) and x3072 (020+) **4-bit (16 Colors) PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged.

*All image filenames are tagged and have the correct page number, including dual-page images.*
- These chapters start with the left-side page first, start with a single page on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- These chapters have a title so the archives contain a titled chapter sub-folder.
- Split chapters by Manga UP! are bundled together as a complete chapter.

----

Compiled tank-style volumes 01-11 of chapters 001-034 in Postered PNG4: https://nyaa.si/view/1980895

title: La Città Delle Bestie Ammaliatrici (1987) [BluRay.Mux.1080p.x264.DTS-ES.6.1.ITA.AC3x2.ITA.FLAC.JPN.Subs.Ita.Eng.v2] [6.5GB] [stress]
description:
**v2 della mia release precedente perfettamente compatibile con dispositivi come kodi ecc... senza artefatti anche con l'encode da hw. Se non avete intenzione di utilizzare un media player/tv per visualizzare il movie non c'è bisogno di riscaricarlo e potete tenere la v1!**

**La Città Delle Bestie Ammaliatrici**

![https://i.ibb.co/JRHcrSwx/SL1500.jpg](https://i.ibb.co/JRHcrSwx/SL1500.jpg)

**.: Scheda del filmato :.**
**Titolo originale:** Youjuu Toshi
**Titolo Kanji:** 妖獣都市
**Anno:** 1987
**Genere:** Azione, Horror 

**.: Trama :.**
Per millenni tra la razza umana e quella dei demoni appartenenti al Lato Oscuro c'è uno scontro segreto, di cui le persone normali non sono a conoscenza. Nel corso della storia dell'umanità ci sono stati molti contatti con il Lato Oscuro. Gli Illuminati del nostro mondo e dell'altro hanno sempre cercato di armonizzare fra loro, scambiandosi idee e conoscenze, imparando a vivere in pace. Ma c'erano altre persone che, per interesse, volevano tenere i due mondi separati e in guerra. A causa loro ci furono anni di genocidi e distruzioni. Alla fine gli Illuminati aumentarono il loro potere in entrambi i mondi, finché fu stipulato un patto di non aggressione. Questo accadeva molti secoli fa e l'ultimo trattato è stato violato parecchie volte ma, alla fine del ventesimo secolo sta per essere stipulato un nuovo trattato di pace. Però alcuni membri del Lato Oscuro non desiderano che venga rinnovato. Per firmare un nuovo trattato viene richiamato dall'Italia il dottor Giuseppe Maiato, il più importante ambasciatore della razza umana, la cui presenza è fondamentale per la firma del trattato. Come guardie del corpo di questo importante personaggio vengono scelti l'umano Renzaburo Taki e la bellissima Makie, appartenente alla razza del Lato Oscuro. Ma non tutto è come sembra e dietro al rinnovo del trattato c'è un piano secolare con lo scopo finale di far integrare le due razze.

**Снято по ранобэ:** [Старик из деревни становится Святым мечом: Хоть я и был простым инструктором-фехтовальщиком в деревне, но успешные ученики не оставляют меня в покое](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/manga.php?id=6202)

**Описание:**
Берил Гардинант сам себя называет «скромным стариком», а зарабатывает на жизнь тем, что учит желающих обращению с мечом в своём додзё в глухой деревне. В молодости он мечтал о славе великом мечника, но те дни остались далеко позади. Внезапно его навещает знаменитый бывший ученик, который приносит сногсшибательные вести: Берил назначен особым инструктором рыцарей Ордена Либериона. Герой отправляется в столицу, где воссоединяется со своими бывшими учениками: элитой рыцарства, великим волшебником и даже искателем приключений, достигшим высшего ранга в гильдии. Но зачем им всем его наставничество теперь?...

title: La Città Delle Bestie Ammaliatrici (1987) [BluRay.Mux.1080p.x265.DTS-ES.6.1.ITA.AC3x2.ITA.FLAC.JPN.Subs.Ita.Eng] [5.6GB] [stress]
description:
**La Città Delle Bestie Ammaliatrici**

![https://i.ibb.co/JRHcrSwx/SL1500.jpg](https://i.ibb.co/JRHcrSwx/SL1500.jpg)

**.: Scheda del filmato :.**
**Titolo originale:** Youjuu Toshi
**Titolo Kanji:** 妖獣都市
**Anno:** 1987
**Genere:** Azione, Horror 

**.: Trama :.**
Per millenni tra la razza umana e quella dei demoni appartenenti al Lato Oscuro c'è uno scontro segreto, di cui le persone normali non sono a conoscenza. Nel corso della storia dell'umanità ci sono stati molti contatti con il Lato Oscuro. Gli Illuminati del nostro mondo e dell'altro hanno sempre cercato di armonizzare fra loro, scambiandosi idee e conoscenze, imparando a vivere in pace. Ma c'erano altre persone che, per interesse, volevano tenere i due mondi separati e in guerra. A causa loro ci furono anni di genocidi e distruzioni. Alla fine gli Illuminati aumentarono il loro potere in entrambi i mondi, finché fu stipulato un patto di non aggressione. Questo accadeva molti secoli fa e l'ultimo trattato è stato violato parecchie volte ma, alla fine del ventesimo secolo sta per essere stipulato un nuovo trattato di pace. Però alcuni membri del Lato Oscuro non desiderano che venga rinnovato. Per firmare un nuovo trattato viene richiamato dall'Italia il dottor Giuseppe Maiato, il più importante ambasciatore della razza umana, la cui presenza è fondamentale per la firma del trattato. Come guardie del corpo di questo importante personaggio vengono scelti l'umano Renzaburo Taki e la bellissima Makie, appartenente alla razza del Lato Oscuro. Ma non tutto è come sembra e dietro al rinnovo del trattato c'è un piano secolare con lo scopo finale di far integrare le due razze.

title: [Team Arcedo] MIRU Watashi no Mirai - 04 VOSTFR (Web-Rip AMZN H.264 1080p E-AC-3).mkv - MIRU: Paths To My Future
description:
Un anime SF en 5 épisodes, avec une histoire différente à chaque fois. Les 5 Virtual Singers du groupe [VWP](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F0ImgyqExvU) offrent leur voix pour l'opening et [MIYAVI](https://www.youtube.com/@MIYAVIOfficial) assurera l'ending !❤️
Une diffusion irrégulière est prévue durant la saison (pas d'hebdomadaire) en raison de notre planning.
Intégralement traduit depuis le japonais - Transcription audio avec Whisper

Source vidéo : https://nyaa.si/view/1963320

- **Synopsis de l'anime** :
>*Dans un futur lointain, les humains ont créé un robot nommé MIRU, capable de voyager dans le temps, de visiter différentes époques, différents lieux, et même des mondes parallèles. Contrairement à certains robots, MIRU n’est pas armé. Au contraire, il aide les gens à surmonter pacifiquement d’immenses obstacles, encourageant de nouveaux départs sans violence.*
*MIRU évolue continuellement en interagissant avec les gens, en apprenant et en se développant pour aider celles et ceux qui luttent pour survivre. Il écoute leurs problèmes et leur apporte son soutien. En aidant ses prochains, MIRU déclenche ce que l’on appelle l’effet papillon, un changement radical qui guide la société vers un avenir plus radieux.
Pourquoi le robot MIRU a-t-il été créé ? Quel est son objectif ? Peut-il sauver la Terre et l’humanité d’un avenir dystopique ?*

title: Love Live! Hasunosora Girls' High School Idol Club 4th Live Dream ~Bloom, The Dream Believers~ Kanagawa | 102nd Class Graduation Live (1080p)
description:
Congratulations on your graduation, 102nd class.

This weekend has been bittersweet. We got a lot of fan favorite songs featuring some 103 and some 104 versions.

Day 1 concluded with the announcement that we'll be getting a multi-stop 5th live featuring all three Hasunosora units and Edel Note each getting their own stop.

Day 2, we said farewell (hopefully not forever, but this might just be the copium) to the 102nd class. The MC section was full of heartfelt comments from each of the cast members and a legendarily long MC from Uisama, with remarks for each of her fellow members.

Announcements from Day 2 consisted of LLLL special packs for the live as well as the new LR (Legend Rare) rarity being introduced for LLLL, and the three graduating members each receiving one LR card. At the very end, they dropped a final announcement that a 3D animated movie is in the works, but didn't include details beyond that.

Encodes moving forward will be a bit larger than I would like them to be, as I've pivoted to using QSV to encode my media instead of CPU encoding, which speeds things up a fair bit at the cost of a size. From my testing, video quality should not be affected, but if things look worse than before, let me know and I'll look into going back to CPU encoding in the future.

Playback has been tested on the latest versions of VLC Media Player and MPV as of June 8, 2025.

Please seed! Hit and runs only hurt others those who come after you.

title: [CosmicRaws] Modern Protagonist - The Father of Ultra Q.mp4
description: A 25-min documentary by Akio Jissoji about Eiji Tsuburaya that aired in the last month of Ultra Q's original broadcast in 1966 (i.e. prior to Ultraman's debut). There was a version uploaded to Archive, but it was poor quality, and I happened to find a [better version of it on NND](https://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm41778277), so I thought I'd share. Maybe one day someone will be able to rip it from one of the various Ultra Q DVD/BD releases it has been included as a bonus feature, but I would like to see this translated one day.

title: [2025] Fest Godzilla [Complete Blu-Ray - 1080p]
description:
All the content of the Blu-Ray + unofficial english subtitles by KaijuKeizer (thanks to them) for the last short movie, Kaiju Daikessen/All Monster Showdown (and that's why this torrent stay in "Raw" category).
https://nyaa.si/view/1922178

Content:
- All 5 short movies for the annual Godzilla Festival.
- Subfolders for each movie's bonuses.
Godzilla Appears at Godzilla Fest: The "Toho Studio Tour" (47mins)
Godzilla vs. Hedorah: Making-of (~8mins), GojiTimes (behind the scenes, ~8 mins) and two trailers (15 secs & 30 secs)
Fest Godzilla 3 - Gigan Attacks: Making-of (~12 mins), GojiSta (behind the scenes, ~8 mins), the "Gigan Suits Rising Project Making" (~8 mins) and a trailer (30 secs).
Fest Godzilla 4 - Operation Jet Jaguar: Making-of (~10 mins), Model Making (about the Jet Jaguar suit, ~5 mins), and a trailer (30 secs)
Fest Godzilla 5 - All Monsters Showdown: Making-of (~10 mins), three "1 minute preview" of behind the scenes and a trailer ( 30 secs)
- And an interview with Kazuhiro Nakagawa and Naoya Matsumoto (43 mins)

description:

Durch einen Zeitsprung landet Rico mit seinem VW-Käfer, obwohl er keinen Führerschein hat, in der Zukunft. Bei diesem Zeitsprung verliert er sein Gedächtnis – selbst seinen Namen hat er vergessen.
In der Zukunft kämpft er mit Dr. Gondo und seiner Polizei-Spezialeinheit gegen die Verbrecherorganisation Necrime unter der Führung des geheimnisumwitterten Fuller und seiner rechten Hand Ludwig. Ricos Verbündete sind die ehemalige Nonne Sophia und der smarte Claude. Trotz Verbrecherjagd und dem damit verbundenen Stress denkt Rico oft über seine Vergangenheit nach und versucht mehr über sich zu erfahren.

title: Elainas Reise S01 German Dubbed DL FLAC 1080p BluRay 10bit x265-CNY
description:
![alt text](https://cdn.anisearch.de/images/anime/cover/14/14689_600.webp "Logo Title Text 1")

Während ihrer Kindheit las Elaina gerne Bücher, vor allem das über die berühmte Hexe Nike, die einst Abenteuer rund um die Welt erlebt hatte. Fest entschlossen, es ihr gleichzutun, lernte sie ohne Unterlass die Kunst der Magie und schaffte es, mit 14 Jahren die bislang jüngste Hexen-Auszubildende von ganz Robetta zu werden. Doch aufgrund ihres Alters und ihrer außergewöhnlichen Talentlage war keine Hexe bereit, sie auszubilden – bis Elaina auf die Hexe Fran traf, die sich schließlich bereiterklärte, ihre Mentorin zu werden.

Ihre Ausbildung verlief allerdings nicht so wie erwartet und Elaina musste eine ganze Reihe seltsamer Aufgaben erfüllen, bis sie überhaupt anfing, Magie zu erlernen. Doch eines Tages war es dann so weit: Sie erhielt mit »Aschgraue Hexe« ihren eigenen Titel und kann – nun als vollwertige Hexe – endlich in die Fußstapfen ihres Vorbilds treten.

Auf ihrer Reise begegnet sie diversen Persönlichkeiten, wie zum Beispiel der angehenden Hexe Saya, die partout ihr Examen nicht besteht und Elaina regelrecht nötigt, ihr bei der Vorbereitung zu helfen. Sayas Weg soll den ihrigen noch öfter kreuzen – einen Weg, auf dem Elaina lernen muss, dass die Welt und die Hexerei viele Wunder bereithalten, jedoch auch Schattenseiten haben, die so manche Existenz oder gar Stadt an den Rand des Ruins treiben können.

Tom Sawyer ist ein Junge, der in der Mitte des 19. Jahrhunderts am Mississippi aufwächst und wegen seiner vielen Streiche bei den Erwachsenen nicht gerade einen guten Ruf genießt. Zusammen mit seinem besten Freund Huckleberry Finn verbringt er seine Tage damit, die Schule zu schwänzen, zu fischen, auf Bäume zu klettern, Wildschweine zu jagen, Piraten zu spielen, mit einem Ballon zu fahren und allerhand Abenteuer zu erleben. An Ideen, um auf lustige Art und Weise ihre Zeit totzuschlagen, mangelt es den beiden jedenfalls nie. Während sie unentwegt Blödsinn anstellen, stoßen Tom und Huck zufällig sogar auf einen versteckten Goldschatz …

title: Weekly Manga UP! Chapter Updates: Week 23 2025 (Digital) (Oak)
description:
Obtained directly from [Manga UP!](https://global.manga-up.com/).
[Converted and denoised](https://pastebin.com/ZeY9fqxW) **4-bit (16 Colors) PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged.
*Except for (Oakii) tagged releases, which are only lossless optimized after denoising.*

*All image filenames are tagged and have the correct page number, including dual-page images.*
- These chapters start with the left-side page first, start with a single page on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- Split chapters by Manga UP! are bundled together as a complete chapter.
- If the chapter has a title, the archive will contain a titled chapter sub-folder.

[Other Weekly UP! Batches](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=3_1&q=weekly+manga+up%21+updates)

----

Also available external (*duplicated* in this batch):
- Dragon and Chameleon, chapter 39 (Inside a new volume compilation batch).
- Teacher, We Will Destroy the World!, chapter 31 (Inside a new volume compilation batch), **Chapter 32 is new**.
- The Duke's Daughter Tiaresia Takes Revenge, chapter 22 (Inside a completed series batch).
- The Villainess's Guide to (Not) Falling in Love, chapter 21 (Inside a new volume compilation batch).

Fixed:
- The Cynical Knight and Gentle Princess, was missing chapter 13 part 3.

Completed Series:
- Final Boss Fake-out, final chapter 31. -- complete batch will follow, final volume compilation after vol. 7 release @ 2025-07-07.
- The Duke's Daughter Tiaresia Takes Revenge, final chapter 22. -- complete batch and volume compilations are on nyaa.
- The Elf and the Hunter's Item Atelier, final chapter 32. -- Not marked as final on the UP! App, waiting to see if we get 32.5 Extra.

Как-то раз по пути из школы киллер Коноха встречает бежавшую ниндзя Сатоко. Та обладает удивительным даром превращать предметы в груду листьев — а сокрытие трупов как раз слабое место Конохи. Тогда девушка-киллер решает приютить беглянку, чтобы вместе стремиться к вершинам рейтинга убийц.

[総合] 
2025年06月08日 午後6:05 〜 午後6:45 (40分)
巨大“フードコート”学食！研究成果が食べられる学食！学生が経営する学食など…学生獲得の起爆剤にもなっている大学の学食を大調査！スポーツ強豪高校の学食にも密着！

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/LCK9Egz.png "有吉のお金発見　突撃！カネオくん　おいしくて大満足！進化する学食のヒミツ")

	少子化が進む中、学生獲得の起爆剤にもなっている大学学食を大調査！まるで“フードコート”な巨大学食から、食生活が乱れがちな大学生の強い味方「１００円朝食」！さらに、研究成果がメニューに！？学生自身が学食経営！？大学の特色生かしまくりの“ならでは学食”まで…学生も大学も運営企業もうれしい！ウィン・ウィンな最新学食のヒミツに迫る！スポーツ強豪高校の学食に密着！ハラペコ生徒たちも大満足の学食スタイルとは？
